title: Application for the Interim Federal Health Program (IFHP) Coverage (IMM 5564) - Canada.ca
content:
## Application for the Interim Federal Health Program (IFHP) Coverage (IMM 5564)
Application for the Interim Federal Health Program (IFHP) Coverage [IMM 5564] (PDF, 1.0 MB)

### How to download, save and open this form
- Use your computer. The form may not open on tablets or mobile phones .
- Save the form on your computer in a place you can remember. For most Internet browsers, clicking on the link above will automatically download the form. If the form doesn’t automatically download, right-click on the link and select “Save as.”
- For most Internet browsers, clicking on the link above will automatically download the form.
- If the form doesn’t automatically download, right-click on the link and select “Save as.”
- After you download the form, open it using Adobe Acrobat Reader.

#### Open this form in Acrobat Reader
- Open Acrobat Reader. You need Acrobat Reader version 10 or higher to open our forms. Get the latest version of Acrobat Reader .
- You need Acrobat Reader version 10 or higher to open our forms.
- Get the latest version of Acrobat Reader .
- Select “ File ” from the top menu.
- Find the location where you saved the form, click on the file, and click “ Open. ”
Read the step by step instructions on how to complete the form.

### Application for IFHP Coverage (IMM
						5564)

#### Section A - Personal Details
In this section, write your personal information, such as family name, date of birth,
							address, etc.
Note: You can find your client identification number (Client ID) on your
								immigration document, issued by the IRCC office, the Case Processing Centre, or the visa
								office where you filed your claim.

#### Section B – Information for Document Replacement
Fill out only if your IFHP document was lost, stolen or destroyed and you are asking for a
							confirmation of existing IFHP coverage.

#### Section C – Your Status in Canada
In this section, describe your immigration status in Canada. Your answers in this section
							will be used to decide if you are eligible for IFHP. Answer truthfully and to the best of
							your knowledge.

#### Section D – Other Information
In this section, tell us if you are eligible for or receive coverage under any provincial or
							territorial health insurance plan. Your answers in this section will be used to
								decide if you are eligible for IFHP. Answer truthfully and to the best of your
								knowledge.

#### Section E – Declaration of Applicant
Read the declaration. Then sign and date at the bottom of the form.
Make sure you attach the supporting documents listed in Step 1: Gather documents .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
